title: Safe & Hygienic Environment
desc: Regular sanitisation, child-safe furniture and materials.

title: Spacious Classrooms
desc: Ventilated, well-lit rooms with dedicated learning and reading corners.

title: Outdoor Play Area
desc: Swimming pool, sand pit, clay pit, swings, slides, go-karting track.

title: Indoor Playroom
desc: Toys, puzzles, blocks, pretend-play sets and child-safe equipment.

title: Montessori Learning Tools
desc: Hands-on materials for motor skills and concept development.

title: Sensory Play Area
desc: Water play, textured surfaces, sensory bins.

title: Parent Portal & Support
desc: Updates, attendance, photos, progress tracking, and on-call counselling.

title: Safety & Health
desc: CCTV surveillance, secure ID entry, first-aid and trained staff.
